metadata.description: Personal Claude Code plugins for code review, development workflows, and prompt engineering

plugins.name: code-review
plugins.description: Comprehensive code review workflow: branch reviews, PR triage, false positive dismissal, and fix tracking

plugins.name: prd-toolkit
plugins.description: Refine, analyze, and validate Product Requirements Documents (PRDs). Publish to GitHub Issues or ClickUp.

plugins.name: claude-md-toolkit
plugins.description: Analyze and optimize CLAUDE.md files using Anthropic's best practices for prompt engineering, XML tags, and memory patterns

plugins.name: discuss
plugins.description: Critical feature discussion and idea refinement with skeptical Staff Engineer perspective

plugins.name: handoff
plugins.description: Generate self-contained prompts for use in other repositories, including API handoffs between frontend and backend teams

plugins.name: onboard
plugins.description: Codebase exploration and onboarding tools for new developers

plugins.name: refactor
plugins.description: Structured refactoring workflow: analyze, plan, and extract code safely

plugins.name: feature-dev
plugins.description: Feature development workflows: test-driven development with coverage gates and parallel codebase exploration before planning

plugins.name: second-opinion
plugins.description: Get second opinions from external AIs (Codex, Gemini, Copilot, Claude) on code reviews, architecture decisions, and implementation approaches

plugins.name: ship
plugins.description: End-to-end shipping workflow: smart staging with change cohesion analysis, conventional commits, test gates, push, and optional PR creation

plugins.name: security
plugins.description: Security auditing workflow: vulnerability scanning, OWASP Top 10 verification, dependency audit, and hardening recommendations

plugins.name: debug
plugins.description: Systematic debugging workflow: structured triage, root cause analysis, regression guards, and error pattern recognition

plugins.name: performance
plugins.description: Performance optimization workflow: measure-first profiling, bottleneck identification, Core Web Vitals, and anti-pattern detection

plugins.name: github-issues
plugins.description: Fix GitHub Issues: fetch issue details, explore the codebase, plan and implement the fix, with multi-repo handoff support

plugins.name: intake
plugins.description: Translate unstructured customer/CSM/Sales/Support requests into engineering feasibility reports, customer-facing reply drafts, and anticipated-objection Q&A — with capability+constraint decomposition and parallel codebase research
